tEn: Seedance 1.0: Exploring the Boundaries of Video Generation Models
tZh: Seedance 1.0：探索视频生成模型的边界
sEn: Seedance 1.0 achieves high-quality, fast video generation with superior spatiotemporal fluidity and precise instruction adherence.
sZh: Seedance 1.0 实现了高质量、快速的视频生成，具有卓越的时空流畅性和精确的指令遵循能力。
absEn: Notable breakthroughs in diffusion modeling have propelled rapid improvements in video generation, yet current foundational model still face critical challenges in simultaneously balancing prompt following, motion plausibility, and visual quality. In this report, we introduce Seedance 1.0, a high-performance and inference-efficient video foundation generation model that integrates several core technical improvements: (i) multi-source data curation augmented with precision and meaningful video captioning, enabling comprehensive learning across diverse scenarios; (ii) an efficient architecture design with proposed training paradigm, which allows for natively supporting multi-shot generation and jointly learning of both text-to-video and image-to-video tasks. (iii) carefully-optimized post-training approaches leveraging fine-grained supervised fine-tuning, and video-specific RLHF with multi-dimensional reward mechanisms for comprehensive performance improvements; (iv) excellent model acceleration achieving ~10x inference speedup through multi-stage distillation strategies and system-level optimizations. Seedance 1.0 can generate a 5-second video at 1080p resolution only with 41.4 seconds (NVIDIA-L20). Compared to state-of-the-art video generation models, Seedance 1.0 stands out with high-quality and fast video generation having superior spatiotemporal fluidity with structural stability, precise instruction adherence in complex multi-subject contexts, native multi-shot narrative coherence with consistent subject representation.
absZh: 扩散建模的显著突破推动了视频生成的快速进步，但当前的基础模型在同时平衡提示遵循、运动合理性和视觉质量方面仍面临关键挑战。在本报告中，我们介绍了 Seedance 1.0，这是一个高性能且推理高效的视频基础生成模型，它整合了多项核心技术改进：（i）多源数据整理，辅以精确且有意义的视频字幕，实现了跨不同场景的全面学习；（ii）高效的架构设计与提出的训练范式，原生支持多镜头生成，并联合学习文本到视频和图像到视频任务；（iii）精心优化的训练后方法，利用细粒度监督微调和具有多维奖励机制的视频特定 RLHF，实现全面的性能提升；（iv）通过多阶段蒸馏策略和系统级优化实现约 10 倍的推理加速。Seedance 1.0 仅需 41.4 秒（NVIDIA-L20）即可生成 5 秒 1080p 分辨率的视频。与最先进的视频生成模型相比，Seedance 1.0 以其高质量和快速的视频生成脱颖而出，具有卓越的时空流畅性和结构稳定性，在复杂的多主体上下文中精确遵循指令，以及具有一致主体表示的原生多镜头叙事连贯性。

contrib.en: Multi-source data curation with precision video captioning enables comprehensive learning across diverse scenarios.
contrib.zh: 多源数据策展与精准视频描述，支持跨多样化场景的全面学习。

contrib.en: Efficient architecture with decoupled spatial-temporal layers and MM-RoPE supports multi-shot and unified T2V/I2V tasks.
contrib.zh: 高效架构采用解耦时空层与多模态RoPE，原生支持多镜头生成及文生视频/图生视频统一任务。

contrib.en: Post-training optimization via fine-grained SFT and video-specific RLHF with multi-dimensional rewards improves motion, aesthetics, and alignment.
contrib.zh: 通过细粒度监督微调和视频专用RLHF（多维奖励）的后训练优化，提升运动、美学和对齐能力。

contrib.en: Multi-stage distillation and system optimizations achieve ~10x inference speedup with no quality degradation.
contrib.zh: 多阶段蒸馏与系统优化实现约10倍推理加速，且质量无损。

contrib.en: Unified model tops both text-to-video and image-to-video leaderboards on Artificial Analysis, outperforming competitors by over 100 Elo points.
contrib.zh: 统一模型在Artificial Analysis的文生视频和图生视频榜单均居首位，领先竞品超100 Elo分。

contrib.en: Native multi-shot narrative with consistent subject representation and cinematic transitions enhances creative control.
contrib.zh: 原生多镜头叙事保持主体一致性及电影化转场，增强创作可控性。

limits.en: Evaluation relies on internal benchmark SeedVideoBench-1.0 and public arena; broader generalization not fully validated.
limits.zh: 评估依赖内部基准SeedVideoBench-1.0和公开竞技场，更广泛的泛化性尚未充分验证。

limits.en: Model performance may degrade on extremely long videos or complex multi-shot scenarios beyond training distribution.
limits.zh: 在超长视频或超出训练分布的复杂多镜头场景下，模型性能可能下降。

limits.en: Inference acceleration techniques may introduce subtle artifacts in high-motion or fine-texture regions.
limits.zh: 推理加速技术可能在高运动或精细纹理区域引入细微伪影。

limits.en: Bilingual support is limited to Chinese and English; other languages not evaluated.
limits.zh: 双语支持仅限于中文和英文，其他语言未评估。

limits.en: Computational resources required for training and inference remain substantial despite optimizations.
limits.zh: 尽管有优化，训练和推理所需的算力资源仍然可观。

items.en: Notable breakthroughs in diffusion modeling have propelled rapid improvements in video generation, yet current foundational model still face critical challenges in simultaneously balancing prompt following, motion plausibility, and visual quality. In this report, we introduce Seedance 1.0, a high-performance and inference-efficient video foundation generation model that integrates several core technical improvements: (i) multi-source data curation augmented with precision and meaningful video captioning, enabling comprehensive learning across diverse scenarios; (ii) an efficient architecture design with proposed training paradigm, which allows for natively supporting multi-shot generation and jointly learning of both text-to-video and image-to-video tasks. (iii) carefully-optimized post-training approaches leveraging fine-grained supervised fine-tuning, and video-specific RLHF with multi-dimensional reward mechanisms for comprehensive performance improvements; (iv) excellent model acceleration achieving 10× inference speedup through multi-stage distillation strategies and system-level optimizations. Seedance 1.0 can generate a 5-second video at 1080p resolution only with 41.4 seconds (NVIDIA-L20). Compared to state-of-the-art video generation models, Seedance 1.0 stands out with high-quality and fast video generation having superior spatiotemporal fluidity with structural stability, precise instruction adherence in complex multi-subject contexts, native multi-shot narrative coherence with consistent subject representation. Seedance 1.0 is now accessible on Volcano Engineα\alpha.

items.en: With recent advances in diffusion models, the progress of video generation has been accelerated considerably. Leading open-source frameworks including Wan [26], Huanyuan Video [15], and CogVideoX [30], complemented by commercial systems such as Veo and Keling, have catalyzed broad academic and industrial adoption. However, current video generation foundation models still have critical challenges in balancing multidimensional requirements, particularly in prompt following, motion plausibility, and visual fidelity. To address these limitations, we present Seedance 1.0, a foundational video generation model with native support bilingual (Chinese/English) video generation and multi-task versatility encompassing text-to-video synthesis and image-guided video generation. Seedance 1.0 integrates four key technical improvements:
items.zh: 随着扩散模型的最新进展，视频生成的进步显著加速。领先的开源框架包括Wan [26]、Huanyuan Video [15]和CogVideoX [30]，以及Veo和Keling等商业系统，促进了广泛的学术和工业应用。然而，当前的视频生成基础模型在平衡多维需求方面仍面临关键挑战，特别是在提示遵循、运动合理性和视觉保真度方面。为解决这些限制，我们提出了Seedance 1.0，一个基础视频生成模型，原生支持双语（中文/英文）视频生成和多任务多功能性，涵盖文本到视频合成和图像引导的视频生成。Seedance 1.0 集成了四项关键技术改进：

items.en: Multi-Source Data with Comprehensive Video Captioning. Through multi-stage, multi-perspective curation and dataset balancing, we construct a large-scale high-quality video dataset spanning diverse categories, styles, and sources. This enables a comprehensive learning of rich scenarios, topics, and action dynamics. Our precision video captioning system ensures accurate interpretation of user instructions while enabling fluent generation of complex video narratives.
items.zh: 多源数据与全面视频字幕。通过多阶段、多视角的策展和数据集平衡，我们构建了一个大规模高质量视频数据集，涵盖多样化的类别、风格和来源。这使得模型能够全面学习丰富的场景、主题和动作动态。我们的精确视频字幕系统确保准确理解用户指令，同时能够流畅生成复杂的视频叙事。

items.en: Efficient Architecture Design. In our design, we decouple spatial and temporal layers with an interleaved multimodal positional encoding. This allows our model to jointly learn both text-to-video and image-to-video in a single model, and natively support multi-shot video generation. In particular, the decoupled layers are integrated with carefully-designed window attentions which further improve model efficiency considerably in both training and inference.
items.zh: 高效架构设计。在我们的设计中，我们使用交错多模态位置编码解耦空间和时间层。这使得我们的模型能够在单个模型中联合学习文本到视频和图像到视频，并原生支持多镜头视频生成。特别地，解耦层与精心设计的窗口注意力机制集成，进一步显著提高了训练和推理中的模型效率。

items.en: Enhanced Post-Training Optimization. We use a small set of carefully collected data for SFT, which is followed by a video-tailored RLHF algorithm (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback). We develop feedback-driven learning algorithms using multiple well-developed reward models, which allow us to considerably improve our performance on both T2V and I2V, in terms of motion naturalness, structural coherence, and visual fidelity.
items.zh: 增强的后训练优化。我们使用一小部分精心收集的数据进行监督微调（SFT），随后进行视频定制的基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）算法。我们利用多个开发良好的奖励模型开发了反馈驱动的学习算法，这使我们能够在运动自然性、结构连贯性和视觉保真度方面显著提高T2V和I2V的性能。

items.en: Inference Acceleration. We proposed a multi-stage distillation framework to reduce the number of function evaluations (NFE) required for generation, with inference infrastructure optimization techniques, achieving over 10× end-to-end speedup with no degradation in model performance.
items.zh: 推理加速。我们提出了一个多阶段蒸馏框架，以减少生成所需的函数评估次数（NFE），并结合推理基础设施优化技术，实现了超过10倍的端到端加速，且模型性能无下降。

items.en: Compared with contemporary models, Seedance 1.0 exhibits four distinguishing characteristics:
items.zh: 与当代模型相比，Seedance 1.0 表现出四个显著特征：

items.en: Comprehensive Generation Capabilities. Seedance 1.0 achieves superior spatiotemporal coherence and structural stability, demonstrating exceptional motion fluidity and physical plausibility. The model produces photorealistic visuals with nuanced textures and compositional richness, attaining state-of-the-art performance across both proprietary evaluation suites and authoritative third-party benchmarks.
items.zh: 全面的生成能力。Seedance 1.0 实现了卓越的时空连贯性和结构稳定性，展现出非凡的运动流畅性和物理合理性。该模型生成具有细腻纹理和丰富构图的光真实感视觉效果，在专有评估套件和权威第三方基准测试中均达到最先进性能。

items.en: Precision Instruction Following. Through comprehensive learning of diverse scenarios, entities, and action semantics, Seedance 1.0 precisely interprets complex user specifications. It robustly handles multi-agent interactions, adaptive camera control, and stylistic variations while maintaining narrative continuity.
items.zh: 精确的指令遵循。通过对多样化场景、实体和动作语义的全面学习，Seedance 1.0 精确解释复杂的用户规范。它稳健地处理多智能体交互、自适应相机控制和风格变化，同时保持叙事连续性。

items.en: Multi-Shot Narrative Capability. Seedance 1.0 natively supports coherent multi-shot storytelling with stable view transitions while maintaining consistent subject representation across temporal-spatial transformations.
items.zh: 多镜头叙事能力。Seedance 1.0 原生支持连贯的多镜头故事讲述，具有稳定的视角转换，同时在时空变换中保持主体表示一致。

items.en: Ultra-Fast Generation Experience. With multiple model acceleration techniques, Seedance 1.0 significantly reduces inference costs: it can generate a 5-second video at 1080p resolution only with 41.4 seconds (NVIDIA-L20), which is substantially faster than other commercial counterparts.
items.zh: 超快生成体验。通过多种模型加速技术，Seedance 1.0 显著降低了推理成本：仅需41.4秒（NVIDIA-L20）即可生成1080p分辨率的5秒视频，远快于其他商业同类产品。

items.en: Seedance 1.0 will be integrated into multiple platforms in June 2025, including Doubao111https://www.doubao.com/chat/create-video and Jimeng222https://jimeng.jianying.com/ai-tool/video/generate. We envision it becoming an essential productivity tool for enhancing professional workflows and daily creative applications.
items.zh: Seedance 1.0 将于2025年6月集成到多个平台，包括豆包和即梦。我们预计它将成为提升专业工作流程和日常创意应用的重要生产力工具。

items.en: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) [14] are widely adopted in modern large-scale image and video generation models [23] to reduce the computation of the subsequent diffusion model and facilitate efficient training and inference. Typically, a variational auto-encoder is usually composed of an encoder and a decoder; the encoder compresses the raw redundant pixel information into a compact latent representation, while the decoder reconstructs the original input from these latent features. The quality of VAE reconstruction directly establishes an upper bound for the realism and clarity achievable by the generative process, whereas the distribution of latent representations significantly impacts the convergence behavior of subsequent Diffusion Transformers (DiT).
items.zh: 变分自编码器（VAE）[14]被广泛用于现代大规模图像和视频生成模型[23]中，以减少后续扩散模型的计算量，促进高效的训练和推理。通常，变分自编码器由编码器和解码器组成；编码器将原始冗余像素信息压缩为紧凑的潜在表示，而解码器则从这些潜在特征重建原始输入。VAE重建的质量直接为生成过程可实现真实感和清晰度设定了上限，而潜在表示的分布显著影响后续扩散Transformer（DiT）的收敛行为。

items.en: Temporally-Causal Compression. Following MAGVIT [31], we adopt a temporally causal convolutional architecture for both the encoder and decoder, allowing joint spatial-temporal compression of images and videos within latent space. To be more specific, the model transforms the input data from the RGB pixel space with shape (T′+1,H′,W′,3)(T^{\prime}+1,H^{\prime},W^{\prime},3) into a continuous latent representation with shape (T+1,H,W,C)(T+1,H,W,C), where (t,h,w,c)(t,h,w,c) denotes time, height, width and channel dimensions with rt=T′Tr_{t}=\frac{T^{\prime}}{T}, rh=H′Hr_{h}=\frac{H^{\prime}}{H}, and rw=W′Wr_{w}=\frac{W^{\prime}}{W} representing the downsample ratios along these three axes, respectively. Benefiting from the causal design, the VAE model can seamlessly process image input and output in the case of T=T′=0T=T^{\prime}=0. The overall compression ratio is given by
items.zh: 时间因果压缩。遵循MAGVIT [31]，我们在编码器和解码器中采用时间因果卷积架构，允许在潜在空间中对图像和视频进行联合时空压缩。具体来说，模型将形状为(T′+1,H′,W′,3)的RGB像素空间的输入数据转换为形状为(T+1,H,W,C)的连续潜在表示，其中(t,h,w,c)分别表示时间、高度、宽度和通道维度，rt=T′/T、rh=H′/H和rw=W′/W分别表示沿这三个轴的下采样比率。得益于因果设计，VAE模型可以在T=T′=0的情况下无缝处理图像输入和输出。总压缩比由下式给出：

items.tex: r=\frac{C\times T\times H\times W}{3\times T^{\prime}\times H^{\prime}\times W^{\prime}}=\frac{C}{3\times r_{t}\times r_{h}\times r_{w}}.

items.en: In our practice, for the sake of training and inference efficiency and overall reconstruction and generation performance, we set (rt,rh,rw)=(4,16,16)(r_{t},r_{h},r_{w})=(4,16,16) and C=48C=48. To accommodate the higher downsampling rate and pursue better generation performance, we remove the patchification operation on the DiT side, following the strategy adopted in DCAE [3].
items.zh: 在我们的实践中，为了训练和推理效率以及整体重建和生成性能，我们设置(rt,rh,rw)=(4,16,16)和C=48。为了适应更高的下采样率并追求更好的生成性能，我们遵循DCAE [3]中采用的策略，移除了DiT侧的块化操作。

items.en: VAE Training. Our VAE is trained with L​1L1 reconstruction loss, KL loss, LPIPS [34] perceptual loss and adversarial training loss. Adversarial training has shown to be effective in improving the quality of VAE reconstruction by enforcing finer supervision on local textures and detailed structures. Taking into account appearance and motion modeling simultaneously, we apply a hybrid discriminator with an architecture similar to that used in PatchGAN [11].
items.zh: VAE训练。我们的VAE使用L1重建损失、KL损失、LPIPS [34]感知损失和对抗训练损失进行训练。对抗训练已被证明通过强制对局部纹理和详细结构进行更精细的监督，有效提高VAE重建质量。同时考虑外观和运动建模，我们应用了一个混合判别器，其架构类似于PatchGAN [11]中使用的架构。

items.en: With the visual tokens encoded by VAE and text tokens generated by a text encoder, we employ the transformer as our diffusion backbone [20], where a fine-tuned decoder-only LLM as the text encoder. The visual tokens are then concatenated with textual tokens and fed into the transformer blocks.
items.zh: 利用VAE编码的视觉标记和文本编码器生成的文本标记，我们采用Transformer作为扩散主干[20]，其中使用一个微调后的仅解码器LLM作为文本编码器。视觉标记随后与文本标记拼接，并输入到Transformer块中。

items.en: Decoupled Spatial and Temporal Layers. Considering both training and inference efficiency, we build the diffusion transformer with decoupled spatial and temporal layers, where the spatial layers perform attention aggregation within each frame, while the temporal layers focus attention computation across frames. We perform window partition within each frame in the temporal layers, allowing for a global receptive field across the temporal dimension. In addition, textual tokens only participate in cross-modality interaction in spatial layers.
items.zh: 解耦的空间和时间层。考虑到训练和推理效率，我们使用解耦的空间和时间层构建扩散Transformer，其中空间层在每个帧内执行注意力聚合，而时间层则跨帧进行注意力计算。我们在时间层中对每个帧进行窗口划分，从而在时间维度上实现全局感受野。此外，文本标记仅参与空间层中的跨模态交互。

items.en: MMDiT Architecture. For the transformer blocks, we follow the MMDiT design in Stable Diffusion 3 [5], where a multi-modality self-attention layer is applied exclusively in spatial layers to integrate both the visual and textual tokens, whereas a self-attention layer only processes the visual tokens in temporal layers. Considering the semantic differences between visual and textual tokens, we use two separate sets of weights including adaptive layer norm, QKV projection, and MLP, for the two modalities in spatial layers. To prevent training instability, the Q and K embeddings are normalized prior to the attention matrix calculation.
items.zh: MMDiT架构。对于Transformer块，我们遵循Stable Diffusion 3 [5]中的MMDiT设计，其中多模态自注意力层仅在空间层中应用，以整合视觉和文本token，而自注意力层仅在时间层中处理视觉token。考虑到视觉和文本token之间的语义差异，我们在空间层中对两种模态使用两组独立的权重，包括自适应层归一化、QKV投影和MLP。为防止训练不稳定，在注意力矩阵计算之前对Q和K嵌入进行归一化。

items.en: Multishot MM-RoPE. In this paper, in addition to using 3D RoPE encoding for visual tokens, following Seaweed [24] and LCT [9], we add 3D Multi-modal RoPE (MM-RoPE) in the concatenated sequences by adding extra 1D positional encoding for textual tokens. The MM-RoPE also supports interleaved sequences of visual tokens and textual tokens, and can be extended to training video with multiple shots, where shots are organized in the temporal order of actions and each shot has its own detailed caption.
items.zh: 多镜头MM-RoPE。在本文中，除了对视觉token使用3D RoPE编码外，遵循Seaweed [24]和LCT [9]，我们通过在拼接序列中为文本token添加额外的1D位置编码，引入3D多模态RoPE（MM-RoPE）。MM-RoPE还支持视觉token和文本token的交错序列，并可扩展到多镜头视频训练，其中镜头按动作的时间顺序组织，每个镜头有其详细的描述。

items.en: Unified Task Formulation. To enable conditional video generation, we concatenate the noisy inputs with cleaned or zero-padded frames along the channel dimension, and use binary masks to indicate which frames are instructions to follow [7]. With this formulation, we can further unify different generation tasks such as text-to-image, text-to-video and image-to-video [4]. During the training process, we mix these tasks and adjust the proportion by controlling the conditional inputs.
items.zh: 统一任务公式。为了实现条件视频生成，我们将噪声输入与干净或零填充帧沿通道维度拼接，并使用二进制掩码指示哪些帧是指令遵循[7]。通过这种公式，我们可以进一步统一不同的生成任务，如文本到图像、文本到视频和图像到视频[4]。在训练过程中，我们混合这些任务，并通过控制条件输入来调整比例。

items.en: Take into account the training and inference efficiency, we employ a cascaded diffusion framework for high-resolution (HR) video generation. The base model generates 480p videos first, which are then upscaled to 720p or 1080p high-resolution videos through a learned diffusion refiner model to enhance visual details and textures.
items.zh: 考虑到训练和推理效率，我们采用级联扩散框架进行高分辨率（HR）视频生成。基础模型首先生成480p视频，然后通过学习的扩散精炼模型将其放大到720p或1080p高分辨率视频，以增强视觉细节和纹理。

items.en: Refiner Model Training. To facilitate training, the diffusion refiner model is initialized from the pre-trained base model. Different from the base model, the diffusion refiner model is trained with conditioning on the low-resolution (LR) videos. Specifically, the LR video is upsampled to a high resolution first, then concatenated with the diffusion noise along the channel dimension to form the input of the diffusion transformer.
items.zh: 精炼模型训练。为便于训练，扩散精炼模型从预训练的基础模型初始化。与基础模型不同，扩散精炼模型以低分辨率（LR）视频为条件进行训练。具体来说，LR视频首先上采样到高分辨率，然后与扩散噪声沿通道维度拼接，形成扩散Transformer的输入。

items.en: As described in Sec 3.2, texts used in DiT are form of dense video captions. Therefore, we need to employ a large language model to convert the user prompts into corresponding caption format. To achieve this, we initialize based on Qwen2.5-14B [29] and employ two stages to implement high-quality Prompt Engineering (PE): Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL).
items.zh: 如第3.2节所述，DiT中使用的文本是密集视频描述的形式。因此，我们需要使用大语言模型将用户提示转换为相应的描述格式。为此，我们基于Qwen2.5-14B [29]初始化，并采用两个阶段实现高质量的提示工程（PE）：监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）。

items.en: Supervised Fine-Tuning. In the SFT stage, we synthesize large amount of user prompts and their dense caption expression by manual annotation. We specially devide the image-to-video (i2v) and text-to-video (t2v) tasks, as they are different in user prompt styles. We then adpot a fully fine-tuning strategy to train the model on the annotated data to aquire basic rephrasing abilitity.
items.zh: 监督微调。在SFT阶段，我们通过人工标注合成大量用户提示及其密集描述表达。我们特别区分了图像到视频（i2v）和文本到视频（t2v）任务，因为它们的用户提示风格不同。然后，我们采用全微调策略在标注数据上训练模型，以获得基本的改写能力。

items.en: Reinforcement Learning. However, due to the presence of model hallucinations, the results of the first SFT stage cannot guarantee that the semantics of the rewritten results fully meet the requirements of the user prompts. Therefore, we carefully collect a dataset of pairs with correct and incorrect rephrased results to perform the Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) [21, 13] training. In this stage, we used the Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) [10] fine-tuning strategy on the SFT model.
items.zh: 强化学习。然而，由于模型幻觉的存在，第一阶段的SFT结果不能保证改写结果的语义完全满足用户提示的要求。因此，我们仔细收集了一个包含正确和错误改写结果配对的数据集，以进行直接偏好优化（DPO）[21, 13]训练。在此阶段，我们在SFT模型上使用了低秩适应（LoRA）[10]微调策略。

items.en: After the above stages, our prompt engineering model has strong ability to understand user prompts and gives precise and high-quality rephrased results in video caption format, consistent with DiT training.
items.zh: 经过上述阶段，我们的提示工程模型具有强大的理解用户提示的能力，并能以视频描述格式给出精确且高质量的改写结果，与DiT训练一致。

items.en: The performance of video generation models is inextricably linked to the scale, diversity, and quality of the training data. While our broader training corpus incorporates both video and image datasets, with image data preparation following methodologies similar to Seedream [8], this section specifically details our rigorous approach to curating video data. We develop a systematic data processing workflow, illustrated in figure˜3, to transform vast, heterogeneous raw video collections into a refined, high-quality, diverse, and safe dataset for training robust video generation models. This workflow is deployed as a robust, automated system optimized for high-throughput processing of massive data volumes.
items.zh: 视频生成模型的性能与训练数据的规模、多样性和质量密不可分。虽然我们的更广泛训练语料库包含视频和图像数据集，图像数据准备遵循类似Seedream [8]的方法，但本节详细介绍了我们严格的视频数据筛选方法。我们开发了一个系统化的数据处理工作流，如图3所示，将大量异构的原始视频集合转化为精炼、高质量、多样且安全的数据集，用于训练鲁棒的视频生成模型。该工作流部署为一个鲁棒的自动化系统，针对海量数据的高吞吐量处理进行了优化。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Our video data processing pipeline, transforming heterogeneous raw videos into a refined, feature-rich training dataset. The workflow comprises three main phases: (1) Diversity-oriented data sourcing for initial acquisition and compliance prescreening from diverse sources; (2) Multi-stage data curation refines raw data into video clips; and (3) Offline data packing where video captioning and VAE encoding are used to generate text and VAE embeddings for model training.
items.capZh: 图3：我们的视频数据处理流水线，将异构原始视频转化为精炼、特征丰富的训练数据集。工作流包括三个主要阶段：（1）面向多样性的数据源获取，从不同来源进行初始采集和合规预筛选；（2）多阶段数据筛选，将原始数据精炼为视频片段；以及（3）离线数据打包，其中视频描述和VAE编码用于生成文本和VAE嵌入，用于模型训练。

items.en: At the heart of our video data curation is a multi-stage pre-processing pipeline, designed to tackle the challenges of raw video collections. Each subsequent stage systematically elevates the dataset’s standard, preparing it for robust model training. The following paragraphs detail each component of this comprehensive pipeline, which ensures that only video clips meeting our stringent criteria contribute to the final dataset.
items.zh: 我们视频数据筛选的核心是一个多阶段预处理流水线，旨在应对原始视频集合的挑战。每个后续阶段系统地提升数据集的标准，为鲁棒的模型训练做好准备。以下段落详细介绍了这个全面流水线的每个组件，确保只有符合我们严格标准的视频片段才能进入最终数据集。

items.en: Diversity-Oriented Data Sourcing. Our video data acquisition strategy prioritizes ethically and legally sourced content from diverse public and licensed repositories. We aim to maximize coverage across critical dimensions, including clip duration, resolution, subject matter (e.g., humans, animals, objects), scene types (e.g., natural landscapes, urban environments), subject actions, genres (e.g., documentary, animation), artistic styles, camera kinematics, and cinematographic techniques. Raw video collections exhibit significant heterogeneity and often contain undesirable elements, posing key challenges that our pipeline is designed to address.
items.zh: 面向多样性的数据源获取。我们的视频数据获取策略优先考虑来自不同公共和许可存储库的符合伦理和法律要求的内容。我们旨在最大化关键维度的覆盖范围，包括片段时长、分辨率、主题（例如，人类、动物、物体）、场景类型（例如，自然景观、城市环境）、主体动作、类型（例如，纪录片、动画）、艺术风格、摄像机运动学和电影摄影技术。原始视频集合表现出显著的异质性，并且通常包含不良元素，这构成了我们的流水线旨在解决的关键挑战。

items.en: Shot-Aware Temporal Segmentation. Raw long-form videos are not suitable for direct model training. We employ automated shot boundary detection techniques by analyzing inter-frame visual dissimilarities or utilizing pre-trained detectors to identify natural scene transitions. Subsequently, videos are segmented into shorter clips, with a maximum duration of 1212 seconds. Each resulting clip may contain one or multiple temporally coherent shots, preserving local narrative flow while ensuring manageable input lengths for model ingestion.
items.zh: 镜头感知的时间分割。原始长视频不适合直接模型训练。我们采用自动镜头边界检测技术，通过分析帧间视觉差异或利用预训练检测器来识别自然的场景转换。随后，视频被分割成较短的片段，最大时长为12秒。每个生成的片段可能包含一个或多个时间上连贯的镜头，保留局部叙事流，同时确保模型输入长度可控。

items.en: Visual Overlay Rectification. Many source videos contain extraneous visual overlays such as logos, watermarks, subtitles, or on-screen graphics that can introduce noise or bias. Our rectification stage identifies these occlusions using a hybrid approach of heuristic rule-based systems and specialized object detection models. Frames are then adaptively cropped to maximize the retention of the primary visual content, yielding cleaner and more focused video data.
items.zh: 视觉叠加修正。许多源视频包含额外的视觉叠加，如标志、水印、字幕或屏幕图形，这些可能引入噪声或偏差。我们的修正阶段通过启发式规则系统和专门的目标检测模型的混合方法识别这些遮挡。然后自适应裁剪帧，以最大化保留主要视觉内容，产生更干净、更聚焦的视频数据。

items.en: Quality and Safety Filtering. To ensure the model is trained on high-quality and ethically compliant data, we enforce rigorous filtering via visual assessment and safety screening. First, clips exhibiting visual defects such as blurriness, excessive jittering, low aesthetic quality, poor cinematographic composition, or predominantly static content are systematically identified and removed by our specialized visual quality model. Second, we rigorously exclude harmful or inappropriate material, deploying advanced classifiers to detect content pertaining to pornography, explicit violence, child exploitation, and explicit nudity, thereby ensuring ethical compliance and dataset safety.
items.zh: 质量和安全过滤。为确保模型在高质量和符合伦理的数据上训练，我们通过视觉评估和安全筛选执行严格的过滤。首先，表现出视觉缺陷的片段，如模糊、过度抖动、低美学质量、不良电影构图或主要为静态内容，由我们的专门视觉质量模型系统识别并移除。其次，我们严格排除有害或不适当的内容，部署高级分类器检测涉及色情、明显暴力、儿童剥削和明显裸露的内容，从而确保伦理合规和数据集安全。

items.en: Semantic Deduplication. To promote dataset diversity and prevent model overfitting to redundant content, we perform semantic deduplication. Video clips are represented by robust feature embeddings extracted from an internally developed video representation model, and these embeddings enable clustering of visually and semantically similar clips. Within each identified cluster of near-duplicates, only the single instance with the highest overall quality score (from the preceding quality filtering stage) is retained.
items.zh: 语义去重。为促进数据集多样性并防止模型对冗余内容过拟合，我们执行语义去重。视频片段由从内部开发的视频表示模型提取的鲁棒特征嵌入表示，这些嵌入使得视觉和语义相似的片段能够聚类。在每个识别的近似重复簇中，仅保留具有最高整体质量分数（来自前一质量过滤阶段）的单个实例。

items.en: Distribution Rebalancing. Raw data often exhibits significant category imbalance across various attributes. We analyze the dataset’s distribution along these dimensions by quantifying frequencies across attributes tailored to different semantic and technical perspectives, such as subject categories, scene types, dominant actions, genres, visual styles, clip duration, resolution, and motion characteristics. For over-represented head categories, downsampling is applied. Conversely, for under-represented tail categories, we increase their sampling probability during training and initiate targeted data acquisition to augment their presence, aiming for a more equitable and comprehensive representation of the visual world.
items.zh: 分布重新平衡。原始数据通常在多个属性上表现出显著的类别不平衡。我们通过量化不同语义和技术视角的属性的频率来分析数据集在这些维度上的分布，例如主题类别、场景类型、主导动作、类型、视觉风格、片段时长、分辨率和运动特征。对于过度表示的头部类别，应用下采样。相反，对于表示不足的尾部类别，我们在训练期间增加其采样概率，并启动有针对性的数据获取以增加其存在，旨在实现视觉世界更公平和全面的表示。

items.en: Video captions largely affect the instruction-following capabilities of the video generation model. We mainly improve the quality and accuracy of captions to ensure that important content and actions can be seen and described proprerly.
items.zh: 视频描述在很大程度上影响视频生成模型的指令遵循能力。我们主要提高描述的质量和准确性，以确保重要内容和动作能够被正确看到和描述。

items.en: Caption Style. We adopt a dense caption style integrating dynamic and static features. For dynamic features, we meticulously describe actions and camera movements of a video clip, highlighting changing elements. For static features, we elaborate on the characteristics of core characters or scenes in the video.
items.zh: 标题风格。我们采用密集标题风格，融合动态与静态特征。对于动态特征，我们细致描述视频片段的动作和镜头运动，突出变化元素。对于静态特征，我们详细阐述视频中核心角色或场景的特性。

items.en: Caption Elements. We define specific categories dynamic and static features respectively. dynamic features cover categories of motions, subjects or scenes changing and camera movements, while static features include appearances, aesthetics, styles, etc. We collect diverse data on such categories and conduct high-quality manual annotations for training. The trained caption model can accurately describe the critical content of complex and abstract video materials.
items.zh: 标题元素。我们分别为动态和静态特征定义了具体类别。动态特征涵盖动作、主体或场景变化以及镜头运动等类别，而静态特征包括外观、美学、风格等。我们收集了这些类别的多样化数据，并进行了高质量的人工标注用于训练。训练后的标题模型能够准确描述复杂抽象视频材料的关键内容。

items.en: Model Training. We train the caption model on the annotated data with Tarsier2 [32], a model with strong video understanding capabilities. The visual encoder is frozen and the language model is fully fine-tuned. We train on both Chinese and English data to acquire bilingual capabilities.
items.zh: 模型训练。我们使用具有强大视频理解能力的 Tarsier2 [32] 在标注数据上训练标题模型。视觉编码器被冻结，语言模型被完全微调。我们在中文和英文数据上进行训练，以获得双语能力。

items.en: During inference, we use our PE model described in Sec 2.4 to rephrase user prompts into detail video captions, in which the format is aligned with the training captions in content and structure.
items.zh: 在推理过程中，我们使用第 2.4 节描述的 PE 模型将用户提示改写为详细的视频标题，其格式在内容和结构上与训练标题保持一致。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Overview of our engineering infrastructure for data processing.
items.capZh: 图 4：数据处理工程基础设施概览。

items.en: Engineering Infrastructure Overview. Our engineering infrastructure for data processing is illustrated in figure˜4, which consists of three layers: at the top is the unified platform layer, automating human-in-the-loop workflows, managing tasks, visualizing data, and monitoring pipelines, etc.; in the middle is the computation framework layer, which employs BMF [2] and Ray [19] for heterogeneous computing across CPU/GPU/NPU architectures and optimizes resource allocation for both stable and elastic computing; at the bottom is the underlying resources layer, which leverages cloud infrastructure from ByteCloud (internal) and Volcengine (external).
items.zh: 工程基础设施概览。我们的数据处理工程基础设施如图 4 所示，包含三层：顶层是统一平台层，自动化人机交互工作流、管理任务、可视化数据以及监控管道等；中间是计算框架层，采用 BMF [2] 和 Ray [19] 实现跨 CPU/GPU/NPU 架构的异构计算，并优化稳定计算和弹性计算的资源分配；底层是底层资源层，利用 ByteCloud（内部）和 Volcengine（外部）的云基础设施。

items.en: Efficient Heterogeneous Computing. To maximize resource utilization, our frameworks dynamically allocate video operations to optimal hardware (e.g., CPU for decoding, GPU for deep model inference). Asynchronous communication between computation units is used to mitigate bottlenecks introduced by the performance gap between different types of computation hardware. To address the complexities arising from the instability of elastic computation resources, our frameworks incorporate two critical capabilities: adaptive auto-scaling to handle resource fluctuations and failure retry mechanisms for preempted tasks. Customized versions of BMF and Ray implement these optimizations, delivering near-linear scalability and extremely high throughput to efficiently process massive-scale video training data.
items.zh: 高效异构计算。为最大化资源利用率，我们的框架将视频操作动态分配给最优硬件（例如，CPU 用于解码，GPU 用于深度模型推理）。计算单元之间的异步通信用于缓解不同类型计算硬件性能差距带来的瓶颈。为解决弹性计算资源不稳定性带来的复杂性，我们的框架包含两个关键能力：自适应自动缩放以应对资源波动，以及针对被抢占任务的失败重试机制。BMF 和 Ray 的定制版本实现了这些优化，提供了近乎线性的可扩展性和极高的吞吐量，以高效处理大规模视频训练数据。

items.en: As shown in Figure 5, we present our training and inference stages of Seedance 1.0. Our training process is divided into several substages, including pre-training, continue training (CT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and human feedback alignment (RLHF). Our refiner also includes pre-training, SFT and RLHF. The visualization results during different training stages are presented in Figure 6, where each stage can progressively improve the results.
items.zh: 如图 5 所示，我们展示了 Seedance 1.0 的训练和推理阶段。我们的训练过程分为几个子阶段，包括预训练、持续训练（CT）、监督微调（SFT）和人类反馈对齐（RLHF）。我们的精炼器也包括预训练、SFT 和 RLHF。不同训练阶段的可视化结果如图 6 所示，每个阶段都能逐步改进结果。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Overview of training and inference pipeline.
items.capZh: 图 5：训练和推理流程概览。

items.en: Diffusion Scheduling. During training, we employ the flow matching framework with velocity prediction, and a training timestep is sampled from a logit-normal distribution. Considering that videos with higher resolution and longer duration require more noise to disrupt their signal, we then transform the training timestep with a resolution-aware shift, which increases the noise perturbation for videos with higher resolution and longer duration.
items.zh: 扩散调度。在训练中，我们采用速度预测的流匹配框架，训练时间步从对数正态分布中采样。考虑到更高分辨率和更长时长的视频需要更多噪声来破坏其信号，我们随后使用分辨率感知移位来变换训练时间步，从而增加对更高分辨率和更长时长视频的噪声扰动。

items.en: Progressive Training. To enable higher data throughput and training efficiency, we initialize the model with sufficient low-resolution text-to-image (256​p​x256px) training and then progressively introduce video modalities with higher resolution and higher fps in following stages: (1) We conduct image-video joint training using 256​p​x256px images and video clips from 3 to 12 seconds (1212 fps). (2) In the second stage, we increase the training resolution to 640​p​x640px while maintaining the same duration. (3) In the final stage, we train the models with 2424 fps video to further improve the video smoothness. During video pre-training, we also retain a small portion of text-to-image task to maintain semantic alignment and set the proportion of the image-to-video task to 20% to activate the ability to follow visual prompts.
items.zh: 渐进式训练。为实现更高的数据吞吐量和训练效率，我们首先使用足够的低分辨率文本到图像（256px×256px）训练来初始化模型，然后在后续阶段逐步引入更高分辨率和更高帧率的视频模态：（1）我们使用 256px×256px 图像和 3 到 12 秒（12fps）的视频片段进行图像-视频联合训练。（2）在第二阶段，我们将训练分辨率提高到 640px×640px，同时保持相同的时长。（3）在最后阶段，我们使用 24fps 视频训练模型，以进一步提高视频平滑度。在视频预训练期间，我们还保留了一小部分文本到图像任务以保持语义对齐，并将图像到视频任务的比例设置为 20% 以激活遵循视觉提示的能力。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Visualization during different post-training stages.
items.capZh: 图 6：不同后训练阶段的可视化结果。

items.en: As the image-to-video task constitutes only a small fraction of pre-training, the model’s potential in this area remains underexplored. To address this, we introduce the Continue Training (CT) phase focused on strengthening image-to-video generation after pre-training. In this phase, we increase the image-to-video ratio from 20%20\% to 40%40\% and further refine the training dataset to improve overall multitask performance.
items.zh: 由于图像到视频任务仅占预训练的一小部分，模型在该领域的潜力尚未充分挖掘。为解决这一问题，我们引入了持续训练（CT）阶段，重点在预训练后加强图像到视频生成。在此阶段，我们将图像到视频比例从 20% 提高到 40%，并进一步优化训练数据集以提升整体多任务性能。

items.en: High-Quality Data Selection. We select a subset of the pre-training data with higher aesthetic quality and richer motion dynamics by using a series of specialized evaluation models, including aesthetic scorer and motion evaluators based on optical flow. Since the first frame is always provided in the image-to-video task, we design two types of caption for training: (1) original long captions with detailed descriptions of both dynamic and static content, and (2) short captions that focus solely on motion dynamics by removing the static description corresponding to the first frame. This encourages stronger semantic alignment with the training objective.
items.zh: 高质量数据选择。我们通过使用一系列专门的评估模型（包括美学评分器和基于光流的运动评估器）来选择预训练数据中美学质量更高、运动动态更丰富的子集。由于图像到视频任务中始终提供第一帧，我们设计了两种类型的标题用于训练：（1）详细描述动态和静态内容的原始长标题，以及（2）通过移除与第一帧对应的静态描述而仅关注运动动态的短标题。这促进了与训练目标的更强语义对齐。

items.en: Training Strategy. During continued training, we use slightly fewer GPUs than in the pre-training stage, while maintaining an annealed learning rate schedule. The richer motion dynamics and diverse captions enable the model to generate more natural and smoother videos. Furthermore, the higher aesthetic quality of the training data leads to significant improvements in the visual fidelity of text-to-video generation. As a result, the final model supports both text-to-video and image-to-video tasks with enhanced overall performance.
items.zh: 训练策略。在持续训练期间，我们使用的 GPU 数量略少于预训练阶段，同时保持退火学习率计划。更丰富的运动动态和多样化的标题使模型能够生成更自然、更平滑的视频。此外，训练数据的更高美学质量显著提升了文本到视频生成的视觉保真度。因此，最终模型支持文本到视频和图像到视频任务，整体性能得到增强。

items.en: Following CT, we perform supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to further align the model’s output with human preferences regarding visual quality and motion coherence. During this phase, the model trains on a carefully curated set of high-quality video-text pairs with manually verified captions, allowing it to generate videos with improved aesthetics and more consistent motion dynamics.
items.zh: 在 CT 之后，我们进行监督微调（SFT），以进一步使模型的输出与人类在视觉质量和运动连贯性方面的偏好对齐。在此阶段，模型在精心策划的高质量视频-文本对数据集上训练，这些数据对具有人工验证的标题，从而使模型能够生成具有更好美学和更一致运动动态的视频。

items.en: Human-Curated Dataset. Ensuring data quality and distributional balance is essential. To achieve this, we define several hundred categories based on visual style, motion type, and other key attributes. We then collect data in a targeted manner within each category, resulting in a curated dataset of high-quality video samples with accurate and meaningful captions.
items.zh: 人工策划数据集。确保数据质量和分布平衡至关重要。为此，我们根据视觉风格、运动类型和其他关键属性定义了数百个类别。然后，我们在每个类别中有针对性地收集数据，从而得到一个包含高质量视频样本和准确有意义标题的策划数据集。

items.en: Model Merging. To fully leverage high-quality data, we train separate models on curated subsets designed to capture a wide range of styles, motions, and scenarios. The resulting models are subsequently merged into a single model that integrates their respective strengths. Each model is trained with a smaller learning rate than in pre-training and utilizes a limited number of GPUs. Moreover, we apply early stopping at an effective point to prevent overfitting and maintain text controllability. The final merging step significantly improves both visual fidelity and motion quality.
items.zh: 模型合并。为充分利用高质量数据，我们在策划的子集上训练单独的模型，这些子集旨在捕捉广泛的风格、运动和场景。生成的模型随后合并为一个集成各自优势的单一模型。每个模型使用比预训练更小的学习率进行训练，并利用有限数量的 GPU。此外，我们在有效点应用早停以防止过拟合并保持文本可控性。最终的合并步骤显著提升了视觉保真度和运动质量。

items.en: We collect prompts from training datasets and online users, and perform data balancing and information filtering on prompts to discard duplicate and ambiguous ones. We collect high-quality video data pairs for human preference labeling, including synthetic videos generated by different stages of our model. Experimental results demonstrate that the incorporation of multiple source visual materials can further enhance the domain capacity of the RM model, expand the preference upper bound of RM, and strengthen generalization capabilities. We adopt a multi-dimensional annotation approach in the labeling process, i.e., selecting the best and worst videos under a specific labeling dimension while ensuring that the best videos are not inferior to the worst ones in other dimensions.
items.zh: 我们从训练数据集和在线用户收集提示，并对提示进行数据平衡和信息过滤，以丢弃重复和模糊的提示。我们收集高质量的视频数据对用于人类偏好标注，包括由我们模型不同阶段生成的合成视频。实验结果表明，引入多种来源的视觉材料可以进一步增强 RM 模型的领域能力，扩展 RM 的偏好上限，并增强泛化能力。我们在标注过程中采用多维标注方法，即在特定标注维度下选择最佳和最差视频，同时确保最佳视频在其他维度上不劣于最差视频。

items.capEn: Figure 7: The reward curves show that the values across diverse reward models all exhibit a stable and consistent upward trend during the base model and Refiner RLHF process.
items.capZh: 图 7：奖励曲线显示，在基础模型和精炼器 RLHF 过程中，不同奖励模型的值均呈现稳定且一致的上升趋势。

items.en: To comprehensively enhance model performance, we design a sophisticated reward system comprising three specialized reward models: Foundational Reward Model, Motion Reward Model, and Aesthetic Reward Model. These dimension-specific reward models, coupled with video-tailored RLHF optimization strategies, enable comprehensive improvements in multiple aspects of the model capabilities, as illustrated in Figure 7. Foundational reward model focuses on enhancing fundamental model capabilities, such as image-text alignment and structural stability. We employ a Vision-Language Model as the architecture of this reward model. Motion reward model helps to mitigate video artifacts while enhancing motion amplitude and vividness. Given that video aesthetics primarily derive from keyframes, we design the aesthetic reward model from image-space input inspired by Seedream [6, 8], with the data source modified to use keyframes from videos.
items.zh: 为全面提升模型性能，我们设计了一个复杂的奖励系统，包含三个专门的奖励模型：基础奖励模型、运动奖励模型和美学奖励模型。这些特定维度的奖励模型，结合针对视频的基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）优化策略，能够在模型能力的多个方面实现全面改进，如图7所示。基础奖励模型专注于增强基础模型能力，如图像-文本对齐和结构稳定性。我们采用视觉-语言模型作为该奖励模型的架构。运动奖励模型有助于减少视频伪影，同时增强运动幅度和生动性。鉴于视频美学主要源自关键帧，我们受Seedream [6, 8]启发，从图像空间输入设计美学奖励模型，并将数据源修改为使用视频的关键帧。

items.en: Reward feedback learning [28, 33, 17, 18] have been widely used in currnet diffusion models. In Seedance 1.0, we simulate the video inference pipeline during training, directly predict x0x_{0} (generated clean video) when the Reward Model (RM) adequately assesses video quality. The optimization strategy directly maximizes the composite rewards from multiple RMs. Comparative experiments against DPO/PPO/GRPO demonstrate that our reward maximization approach is the most efficient and effective approach, comprehensively improving text-video alignment, motion quality, and aesthetics. Furthermore, we preform multi-round iterative learning between the diffusion model and RMs. This approach raises the performance bound of the RLHF process and is more stable and controllable than dynamic update of the RM.
items.zh: 奖励反馈学习[28, 33, 17, 18]已广泛应用于当前的扩散模型。在Seedance 1.0中，我们在训练期间模拟视频推理流程，当奖励模型（RM）充分评估视频质量时，直接预测x0（生成的干净视频）。优化策略直接最大化来自多个RM的复合奖励。与DPO/PPO/GRPO的对比实验表明，我们的奖励最大化方法是最高效且最有效的方法，全面改善了文本-视频对齐、运动质量和美学效果。此外，我们在扩散模型和RM之间执行多轮迭代学习。这种方法提高了RLHF过程的性能上限，并且比动态更新RM更稳定、更可控。

items.en: As shown in Figure 8, we also apply RLHF on our diffusion refiner, which can be regarded as a diffusion-based conditional generative model. During training, low-resolution VAE latent space representations serve as conditional inputs to the super-resolution model, while the generated high-resolution videos are evaluated by multiple Reward Models. We directly maximize a linear combination of these reward signals. Notably, our approach applies RLHF directly to the accelerated refiner model, effectively enhancing motion quality and visual fidelity in low-NFE scenarios while maintaining computational efficiency.
items.zh: 如图8所示，我们还将RLHF应用于我们的扩散精炼器，该精炼器可视为基于扩散的条件生成模型。训练期间，低分辨率VAE潜在空间表示作为超分辨率模型的条件输入，而生成的高分辨率视频由多个奖励模型评估。我们直接最大化这些奖励信号的线性组合。值得注意的是，我们的方法直接将RLHF应用于加速的精炼器模型，在低NFE场景下有效提升运动质量和视觉保真度，同时保持计算效率。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Visualization during different resolutions and RLHF process.
items.capZh: 图8：不同分辨率和RLHF过程中的可视化。

items.en: DiT Optimizations. To accelerate DiT inference, we adopt diffusion distillation techniques to reduce the number of function evaluations (NFE) required for generation. We incorporate the Trajectory Segmented Consistency Distillation (TSCD) technique, originally introduced in HyperSD[22], which partitions the denoising trajectory into multiple segments and enforces consistency between predicted and target states across these segments. This allows the student model to learn an accurate approximation of the diffusion process with fewer steps. Using TSCD, our DiT model performs competitively with 4x acceleration, offering a strong balance between speed and fidelity. To push acceleration further, we incorporate Score Distillation from RayFlow[25], which aligns the student model’s predicted noise (i.e., score function) with that of the teacher using expected noise consistency. This approach supports trajectory-level optimization for each sample, enabling more stable and adaptive sampling even at low NFEs. It effectively improves generalization and reduces artifacts during fast generation. To improve visual quality, we extend the adversarial training strategy from APT[16] to a multi-step distillation setting, incorporating human preference data for supervision. A learned discriminator guides the student model toward outputs favored by human judgments, effectively mitigating artifacts from aggressive acceleration and enhancing perceptual realism.
items.zh: DiT优化。为加速DiT推理，我们采用扩散蒸馏技术以减少生成所需的函数评估次数（NFE）。我们引入了轨迹分段一致性蒸馏（TSCD）技术，该技术最初在HyperSD[22]中提出，它将去噪轨迹划分为多个段，并在这些段之间强制执行预测状态与目标状态之间的一致性。这使得学生模型能够以更少的步骤学习扩散过程的精确近似。使用TSCD，我们的DiT模型在4倍加速下表现出竞争力，在速度和保真度之间实现了良好平衡。为进一步加速，我们引入了RayFlow[25]的分数蒸馏，该技术通过期望噪声一致性，使学生模型预测的噪声（即分数函数）与教师模型对齐。这种方法支持每个样本的轨迹级优化，即使在低NFE下也能实现更稳定和自适应的采样。它有效改善了泛化能力，并减少了快速生成过程中的伪影。为提升视觉质量，我们将APT[16]的对抗训练策略扩展到多步蒸馏设置，并引入人类偏好数据进行监督。学习到的判别器引导学生模型输出符合人类判断的结果，有效缓解了激进加速带来的伪影，并增强了感知真实感。

items.en: Through the proposed distillation pipeline, our final distilled model achieves comparable results to the original model across four expert-evaluated dimensions: prompt alignment, motion quality, visual fidelity, and consistency with the source image.
items.zh: 通过所提出的蒸馏流程，我们最终的蒸馏模型在四个专家评估维度上（提示对齐、运动质量、视觉保真度和与源图像的一致性）取得了与原始模型相当的结果。

items.en: VAE Optimizations. In video generation tasks, the decoding process from latent space to pixel space incurs significant computational cost. We profiled the VAE decoder and found that stages closer to the pixel space dominate the latency. By narrowing the channel widths in these stages, we design a thin VAE decoder. Retraining it with a fixed pre-trained encoder, we achieve a 2× speedup with no loss in visual quality of the end-to-end video generation.
items.zh: VAE优化。在视频生成任务中，从潜在空间到像素空间的解码过程会产生显著的计算成本。我们对VAE解码器进行了性能分析，发现更接近像素空间的阶段主导了延迟。通过缩小这些阶段的通道宽度，我们设计了一个轻量级VAE解码器。使用固定的预训练编码器重新训练该解码器，我们实现了2倍加速，且端到端视频生成的视觉质量没有损失。

items.en: High-Performance Kernel. Extensive kernel fusion efforts have been conducted on the model’s core modules, resulting in a cumulative 15% improvement in the model’s inference throughput.
items.zh: 高性能内核。我们对模型的核心模块进行了广泛的内核融合，使模型推理吞吐量累计提升了15%。

items.en: Quantization and Sparse. Building on the Seedream [8] technical solution, we have implemented fine-grained mixed-precision quantization tailored for Attention and Gemm operations. Moreover, our exploration revealed that the sparse attributes of DiTs exhibit hierarchical and blockified structures across and within various modalities. Expanding on the methodology established by AdaSpa [27], we have introduced a streamlined tuning solution focused on minimizing search stage overhead. Additionally, we have successfully integrated our optimized fine-grained Attention Quantization approach into this scheme. Numerous efforts have been dedicated to mitigating the impact of full quantization and sparsity on the quality of pixel-level generation. We have achieved an optimal balance between performance and efficiency.
items.zh: 量化与稀疏化。基于Seedream [8]技术方案，我们实现了针对Attention和Gemm运算的细粒度混合精度量化。此外，我们的探索揭示，DiT的稀疏属性在不同模态内部和跨模态之间呈现出层次化和块状结构。在AdaSpa [27]方法的基础上，我们引入了一个简化的调优方案，专注于最小化搜索阶段开销。此外，我们成功将优化的细粒度Attention量化方法集成到该方案中。我们投入了大量精力来减轻全量化和稀疏化对像素级生成质量的影响，最终在性能和效率之间实现了最佳平衡。

items.en: Parallelism Strategy. In order to decrease the allocated massive memory due to the long sequence in video generation schema. A customized adaptive hybrid parallel strategy has been proposed to effectively split the sequences. This approach integrates the concept of context parallelism to optimize communication processes, resulting in a reduction of communication overhead to a quarter of the level observed in Ulysses [12]. Simultaneously, we have further reduced end-to-end communication overhead by introducing FP8 communication.
items.zh: 并行策略。为减少视频生成模式中长序列导致的大量内存分配，我们提出了一种定制的自适应混合并行策略，以有效分割序列。该方法结合了上下文并行的概念来优化通信过程，将通信开销降低到Ulysses [12]水平的四分之一。同时，我们通过引入FP8通信进一步减少了端到端通信开销。

items.en: Async Offloading Strategy. Due to the extensive computational demands of attention coupled with the large model size. We developed an automated and adaptive AsyncOffloading strategy. We successfully solved the large model deployment problem on memory-limited devices with a performance drop of less than 2%.
items.zh: 异步卸载策略。由于注意力机制的巨大计算需求以及模型规模庞大，我们开发了一种自动且自适应的异步卸载策略。我们成功解决了在内存受限设备上的大模型部署问题，性能下降小于2%。

items.en: Hybrid Parallelism for Distributed VAE. Moreover, to address the issue of high GPU memory consumption due to the VAE-Decoder, we implemented an adaptive hybrid parallel strategy. This method partitions the input data along the spatial and temporal dimensions simultaneously and employs efficient collective communication for Conv3D computation. Thus, we further improved parallel scaling performance.
items.zh: 分布式VAE的混合并行。此外，为解决VAE解码器导致的高GPU内存消耗问题，我们实现了一种自适应混合并行策略。该方法同时沿空间和时间维度划分输入数据，并对Conv3D计算采用高效的集合通信。因此，我们进一步提升了并行扩展性能。

items.en: Pipeline Optimizations. We adopted kernel fusion, quantization, parallelization, continuous batching, prefix caching, and other common techniques to improve the overall throughput of the prompt engineering effectively. Furthermore, to tackle the issue of low encoding efficiency in long videos, we have implemented video encoding acceleration solutions.
items.zh: 流水线优化。我们采用了内核融合、量化、并行化、连续批处理、前缀缓存等常见技术，有效提升了提示工程的整体吞吐量。此外，为解决长视频编码效率低的问题，我们实现了视频编码加速方案。

items.en: These innovations have effectively boosted the E2E efficiency of the whole inference pipeline.
items.zh: 这些创新有效提升了整个推理流水线的端到端效率。

items.en: To support efficient large-scale pre-training of long-context video models on thousands of GPUs, we have designed a highly optimized training infrastructure. Our system focuses on maximizing hardware efficiency, scalability, and robustness. It integrates high-performance kernel fusion, a hybrid parallelism strategy, multi-level activation checkpointing (MLAC), runtime-aware workload balancing, and multi-level fault tolerance. These components work together to ensure stable, high-throughput training under diverse workloads and hardware scales.
items.zh: 为支持在数千GPU上高效大规模预训练长上下文视频模型，我们设计了一个高度优化的训练基础设施。我们的系统专注于最大化硬件效率、可扩展性和鲁棒性。它集成了高性能内核融合、混合并行策略、多级激活检查点（MLAC）、运行时感知的工作负载平衡和多级容错。这些组件协同工作，确保在不同工作负载和硬件规模下实现稳定、高吞吐量的训练。

items.en: High-Performance Kernel. To fully utilize GPU hardware resources, we combined torch.compile with handcrafted CUDA kernels for performance-critical operators. We identified memory-bound operations and fuse them into single CUDA kernels to minimize redundant memory access, such as rotary position encoding (RoPE) and normalization. These fused kernels store intermediate results in registers or shared memory, significantly improving arithmetic intensity and reducing global memory traffic by over 90%.
items.zh: 高性能内核。为充分利用GPU硬件资源，我们将torch.compile与手工编写的CUDA内核结合用于性能关键算子。我们识别出内存受限的操作，并将其融合为单个CUDA内核，以最小化冗余内存访问，例如旋转位置编码（RoPE）和归一化。这些融合内核将中间结果存储在寄存器或共享内存中，显著提高了算术强度，并将全局内存流量减少了90%以上。

items.en: Parallelism Strategy. We adopted a hybrid parallelism strategy combining data parallelism and sequence parallelism to efficiently train long-context models on thousands of GPUs. Specifically, we employed Hybrid Sharded Data Parallelism (HSDP) [35] for memory-efficient weight sharding and mitigating performance degradation observed when scaling to over thousands of GPUs. For sequence parallelism, we followed the Ulysses [12] approach, sharding tokens across GPUs along the sequence and head dimensions to enable parallel processing of long video samples.
items.zh: 并行策略。我们采用结合数据并行和序列并行的混合并行策略，以在数千GPU上高效训练长上下文模型。具体而言，我们采用混合分片数据并行（HSDP）[35]实现内存高效的权重分片，并缓解扩展到数千GPU时观察到的性能下降。对于序列并行，我们遵循Ulysses [12]方法，沿序列和头维度对令牌进行分片，以实现长视频样本的并行处理。

items.en: Multi-Levels Activation Checkpointing. Multi-Level Activation Checkpointing (MLAC) [24] policy is employed to reduce GPU memory pressure under negligible recomputation overhead during backpropagation. MLAC implements optimized asynchronous caching and prefetching mechanisms to maximize the overlap between memory transfers and forward/backward computation. We leveraged MLAC to prioritize offloading output tensors of the operators (ops) with the highest recomputation cost during model training, e.g., attention and FC2 layer in MLP module. Furthermore, MLAC was applied to offload input tensors of the activation checkpointing module to attain zero activation occupancy in GPU memory, which allows us to lower the degree of sequence parallelism and thereby reduce communication overhead.
items.zh: 多级激活检查点。采用多级激活检查点（MLAC）[24]策略，在反向传播过程中以可忽略的重计算开销降低GPU内存压力。MLAC实现了优化的异步缓存和预取机制，以最大化内存传输与前向/后向计算的重叠。我们利用MLAC优先卸载模型训练中重计算成本最高的算子（如注意力机制和MLP模块中的FC2层）的输出张量。此外，MLAC还用于卸载激活检查点模块的输入张量，以实现GPU内存中零激活占用，从而允许我们降低序列并行度，进而减少通信开销。

items.en: Workload Balance. Large-scale video pre-training often involves heterogeneous data types (e.g., long vs. short videos, varying resolution), which introduces significant computational imbalance across GPUs. To address this, we applied a runtime-aware workload balancing strategy [24], leveraging an additional all-to-all communication step to distribute workload evenly across GPUs. This balancing strategy is performed within each batch to maintain data consistency, and is asynchronously precomputed in the background to avoid stalling the main training loop. Our approach significantly reduced inter-GPU idle time and improves overall training throughput.
items.zh: 工作负载平衡。大规模视频预训练通常涉及异构数据类型（例如，长视频与短视频、不同分辨率），这会在GPU之间引入显著的计算不平衡。为解决此问题，我们应用了运行时感知的工作负载平衡策略[24]，利用额外的全到全通信步骤在GPU之间均匀分配工作负载。该平衡策略在每个批次内执行以保持数据一致性，并在后台异步预计算以避免阻塞主训练循环。我们的方法显著减少了GPU间空闲时间，并提高了整体训练吞吐量。

items.en: Fault Tolerance. In large-scale training jobs running on thousands of GPUs over extended periods, transient failures are inevitable. To ensure robustness, we integrated fault tolerance at multiple levels. First, we implemented periodic checkpointing of both model and optimizer states, with full support for FSDP-sharded weights. The states of the dataloader were also saved to ensure bitwise-exact resumption. Second, we conducted thorough machine health checks before launching each job to eliminate potential stragglers and faulty nodes. Third, we reduced model initialization overhead to maximize effective training time. For example, we utilized PyTorch’s meta tensor initialization to directly load model parameters, eliminating the time typically spent on standard initialization. Combined, these strategies enhanced training reliability and minimize the impact of hardware or software failures during prolonged distributed runs.
items.zh: 容错。在数千GPU上长时间运行的大规模训练任务中，瞬时故障不可避免。为确保鲁棒性，我们在多个层面集成了容错机制。首先，我们实现了模型和优化器状态的周期性检查点保存，并完全支持FSDP分片权重。数据加载器的状态也被保存，以确保按位精确恢复。其次，我们在启动每个任务前进行彻底的机器健康检查，以消除潜在的落伍节点和故障节点。第三，我们减少了模型初始化开销，以最大化有效训练时间。例如，我们利用PyTorch的元张量初始化直接加载模型参数，消除了标准初始化通常花费的时间。综合这些策略，增强了训练可靠性，并最小化了长时间分布式运行期间硬件或软件故障的影响。

items.en: Post-training primarily consists of three phases: supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, and distillation. During this stage, it is essential not only to optimize training efficiency but also to minimize GPU memory consumption (e.g., reducing peak memory usage and fragmentation) and enhance overall memory utilization. The suboptimal GPU memory utilization observed in the post-training stage primarily stems from three factors:
items.zh: 后训练主要包括三个阶段：监督微调、强化学习和蒸馏。在此阶段，不仅要优化训练效率，还要最小化GPU内存消耗（例如，减少峰值内存使用和碎片化），并提高整体内存利用率。后训练阶段观察到的次优GPU内存利用率主要源于三个因素：

items.en: Memory Contention. During the reinforcement learning and distillation phases, GPU memory is sequentially and dynamically shared among various components, including the Text Encoder, DiT, VAE, reward models, and their corresponding activation tensors.
items.zh: 内存争用。在强化学习和蒸馏阶段，GPU内存在文本编码器、DiT、VAE、奖励模型及其对应的激活张量等各个组件之间顺序且动态地共享。

items.en: Complex Training Modes. The coexistence of trainable and frozen model components complicates memory management and introduces additional optimization challenges.
items.zh: 复杂训练模式。可训练和冻结模型组件的共存使内存管理复杂化，并引入了额外的优化挑战。

items.en: Diverse Workloads. The concurrent presence of both long and short video sequences creates variable memory demands, making traditional static memory optimization methods ineffective.
items.zh: 多样化工作负载。长视频序列和短视频序列的同时存在造成了可变的内存需求，使得传统的静态内存优化方法无效。

items.en: To effectively address these challenges, we have developed a dynamic memory management framework that incorporates CPU offloading and recomputation techniques. Additionally, we adopted the parallelization strategies previously used during pre-training, leveraging FSDP and sequence parallelism to enable efficient multi-node scaling.
items.zh: 为了有效应对这些挑战，我们开发了一个动态内存管理框架，结合了CPU卸载和重计算技术。此外，我们采用了预训练阶段使用的并行化策略，利用FSDP和序列并行实现高效的多节点扩展。

items.en: Memory Optimization. To ensure simplicity and ease of use, we utilized PyTorch hooks to implement CPU offloading, thereby minimizing intrusive modifications to user code. Through detailed profiling and modeling, we identified optimal CPU offloading and recomputation strategies. In addition, we applied localized static memory planning to mitigate memory fragmentation caused by frequent allocation and free of tensors with varying sizes.
items.zh: 内存优化。为确保简单易用，我们利用PyTorch钩子实现CPU卸载，从而最小化对用户代码的侵入性修改。通过详细的性能分析和建模，我们确定了最优的CPU卸载和重计算策略。此外，我们应用了局部静态内存规划，以缓解因频繁分配和释放不同大小张量而导致的内存碎片化。

items.en: Parallelism Strategy. To maximize hardware utilization, we configured different degrees of sequence parallelism across different models based on their computational characteristics. Additionally, we set TORCH_NCCL_AVOID_RECORD_STREAMS=1 to eliminate delayed memory release issues. Additionally, we manually managed the free_event_queue to address the problem of delayed parameter release in FSDP when parameters are frozen. Furthermore, we utilized register_post_backward_reshard_only_hook to adjust the order of memory allocation and release during backward computation under the frozen mode.
items.zh: 并行策略。为最大化硬件利用率，我们根据不同的模型计算特性配置了不同程度的序列并行。此外，我们设置了TORCH_NCCL_AVOID_RECORD_STREAMS=1以消除延迟内存释放问题。同时，我们手动管理了free_event_queue，以解决FSDP中参数冻结时参数释放延迟的问题。此外，我们利用register_post_backward_reshard_only_hook来调整冻结模式下反向计算期间内存分配和释放的顺序。

items.en: These optimizations ensure stable and efficient post-training performance, even in complex scenarios involving multiple model components and diverse video workloads.
items.zh: 这些优化确保了即使在涉及多个模型组件和多样化视频工作负载的复杂场景中，后训练也能稳定高效地执行。

items.en: This section provides a comprehensive evaluation of Seedance 1.0, structured as follows. In Section 7.1, we first present results from an external public evaluation platform, where Seedance 1.0 tops the leaderboards in both text-to-video and image-to-video. Section 7.2 details the internal evaluation, covering benchmark design, absolute scoring, and comparative analysis using the Good-Same-Bad (GSB) metric. The subsequent subsections highlight Seedance 1.0’s strengths in multi-shot transitions and multi-style generation. The overall results are presented in Figure 1.
items.zh: 本节对Seedance 1.0进行全面评估，结构如下。在第7.1节中，我们首先展示外部公共评估平台的结果，Seedance 1.0在文生视频和图生视频两个排行榜上均位居榜首。第7.2节详细介绍了内部评估，包括基准设计、绝对评分以及使用Good-Same-Bad（GSB）指标进行的比较分析。后续小节突出了Seedance 1.0在多镜头转换和多风格生成方面的优势。总体结果如图1所示。

items.en: Artificial Analysis [1] has emerged as a widely recognized and trusted benchmarking platform, particularly in the domains of image and video generation. It offers an open arena in which various generative models are evaluated and scored by the public. Leveraging a large corpus of comparison results, the platform calculates Elo scores to reflect user preferences across different models. The Artificial Analysis Video Arena Leaderboard comprises two distinct tracks: text-to-video and image-to-video. Seedance 1.0 has participated in both categories. Some notable external competitors include Veo 3, Kling 2.0, Runway Gen4, OpenAI Sora, and Wan 2.1.
items.zh: Artificial Analysis [1]已成为广泛认可和信赖的基准测试平台，尤其在图像和视频生成领域。它提供了一个开放竞技场，各种生成模型由公众评估和评分。利用大量比较结果，该平台计算Elo分数以反映不同模型间的用户偏好。Artificial Analysis视频竞技场排行榜包含两个独立赛道：文生视频和图生视频。Seedance 1.0参与了这两个类别。一些值得注意的外部竞争对手包括Veo 3、Kling 2.0、Runway Gen4、OpenAI Sora和Wan 2.1。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Results from Artificial Analysis Arena. Seedance 1.0 achieves the top position on both the text-to-video and image-to-video leaderboards.
items.capZh: 图9：Artificial Analysis竞技场的结果。Seedance 1.0在文生视频和图生视频排行榜上均取得第一名。

items.en: Seedance 1.0 tops both the text-to-video and image-to-video leaderboards, demonstrating a substantial performance advantage over competing models. In particular, it outperforms the second- and third-best models, Veo 3 and Kling 2.0, by over 100 points in the image-to-video task. Notably, Seedance 1.0 attains state-of-the-art results across both tasks using a single unified model, whereas prior models typically excelled in one domain while underperforming in the other. The subsequent sections provide a detailed analysis of Seedance 1.0’s advantages in each scenario.
items.zh: Seedance 1.0在文生视频和图生视频排行榜上均位居榜首，展现出相对于竞争模型的显著性能优势。特别是在图生视频任务中，它领先第二名和第三名模型Veo 3和Kling 2.0超过100分。值得注意的是，Seedance 1.0使用单一统一模型在两个任务上均达到了最先进的结果，而之前的模型通常在一个领域表现出色，在另一个领域则表现不佳。后续章节将详细分析Seedance 1.0在每个场景中的优势。

items.en: Besides overall user preferences, a comprehensive benchmark is equally important for the evaluation of visual generation models, as it enables a more holistic assessment of model capabilities. We developed SeedVideoBench-1.0, a comprehensive benchmark for video generation, comprising 300 prompts each for T2V and I2V. We then collaborated with film director experts to co-develop evaluation criteria and conducted a detailed manual expert evaluation.
items.zh: 除了整体用户偏好，全面的基准测试对于视觉生成模型的评估同样重要，因为它能够更全面地评估模型能力。我们开发了SeedVideoBench-1.0，这是一个全面的视频生成基准，包含300个文生视频提示和300个图生视频提示。然后，我们与电影导演专家合作共同制定评估标准，并进行了详细的人工专家评估。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Absolute Evaluation for Text-to-Video task.
items.capZh: 图10：文生视频任务的绝对评估。

items.en: To comprehensively evaluate video generation models across diverse scenarios, we proposed SeedVideoBench-1.0, a benchmark designed through systematic analysis of real-world user prompts. This benchmark encompasses a wide range of application scenarios, including special effects, e-commerce, and professional-generated content (PGC). Additionally, a detailed taxonomy has been developed to assess model capabilities. The following section demonstrates the classification of main label categories, using text-to-video as an example.
items.zh: 为了全面评估视频生成模型在不同场景下的表现，我们提出了SeedVideoBench-1.0，这是一个通过系统分析真实用户提示而设计的基准。该基准涵盖了广泛的应用场景，包括特效、电子商务和专业生成内容（PGC）。此外，还开发了详细的分类法来评估模型能力。以下部分以文生视频为例展示了主要标签类别的分类。

items.en: Subject It is essential to first evaluate the model’s ability to accurately generate primary entities, including humans, animals, natural scenes, consumer goods, and some virtual subjects.
items.zh: 主体 首先需要评估模型准确生成主要实体的能力，包括人类、动物、自然场景、消费品和一些虚拟主体。

items.en: Subject Description The focus is on models’ ability to produce accurate representations of primary subjects. It includes subject quantity, entity attributes (e.g. appearance characteristics of human subjects, object properties of physical items), and spatial positioning.
items.zh: 主体描述 重点在于模型生成主要主体的准确表示能力。包括主体数量、实体属性（例如，人类主体的外观特征、物理物品的对象属性）和空间定位。

items.en: Action Action simulation and generation represent fundamental capabilities of video generation models, indicative of their proficiency in capturing real-world dynamics and underlying physical laws. This category assesses motion-related actions across multiple categories, including human activities, multi-entity interactions, animal locomotion, sports movements, natural phenomena (e.g., weather events, biological processes), physical principles (e.g., gravity, fluid dynamics), and creative or imaginative motion patterns.
items.zh: 动作 动作模拟和生成是视频生成模型的基本能力，表明它们捕捉现实世界动态和基本物理规律的熟练程度。此类别评估跨多个类别的运动相关动作，包括人类活动、多实体交互、动物运动、体育动作、自然现象（例如，天气事件、生物过程）、物理原理（例如，重力、流体动力学）以及创造性或想象的运动模式。

items.en: Action Description This category provides a finer-grained analysis of action generation, focusing on action number, movement direction, temporal sequencing, motion intensity, and expression of emotional states.
items.zh: 动作描述 此类别提供更细粒度的动作生成分析，关注动作数量、运动方向、时间顺序、运动强度和情感状态的表达。

items.en: Camera The camera language component reflects a distinctive dimension of artistic expression in video generation, encompassing camera movements, shooting angles, shot size definition and variation, as well as transitions between multiple shots. SeedVideoBench-1.0 integrates a range of professional camera movements, including circular tracking shots, dolly-in shots, Hitchcock zooms, lateral pans, and follow shots.
items.zh: 镜头 镜头语言组件反映了视频生成中艺术表达的一个独特维度，包括摄像机运动、拍摄角度、镜头尺寸定义和变化，以及多镜头之间的转换。SeedVideoBench-1.0整合了一系列专业摄像机运动，包括环形跟拍、推轨镜头、希区柯克变焦、横向平移和跟拍镜头。

items.en: Aesthetic description Aesthetics evaluation is an essential component in assessing visual generation models. This part encompasses style consistency, compositional atmosphere, lighting and shadow dynamics, and other factors governing the overall aesthetic quality of the generated videos.
items.zh: 美学描述 美学评估是评估视觉生成模型的重要组成部分。这部分涵盖风格一致性、构图氛围、光影动态以及其他影响生成视频整体美学质量的因素。

items.en: The taxonomy for image-to-video is similar, with the addition of a labeling system for the first frame. For both text-to-video and image-to-video tasks, we construct 300 prompts each, uniformly distributed across the aforementioned categories. The quantity of prompts per category is designed to ensure sufficient discriminative and statistical confidence in the evaluation.
items.zh: 图像到视频的分类类似，但增加了首帧标注系统。对于文本到视频和图像到视频任务，我们各构建了300个提示，均匀分布在前述类别中。每个类别的提示数量旨在确保评估具有足够的区分度和统计置信度。

items.en: In collaboration with film directors, we developed a set of specialized evaluation metrics for generated videos, enabling assessment from a professional perspective. Unlike public preference evaluations, which often emphasize aesthetic appeal while neglecting fine-grained distinctions in model capabilities, this framework is structured around four core dimensions.
items.zh: 与电影导演合作，我们为生成视频开发了一套专业评估指标，能够从专业角度进行评估。与通常强调美学吸引力而忽略模型能力细粒度差异的公共偏好评估不同，该框架围绕四个核心维度构建。

items.en: Motion Quality Motion Quality is the first intuitive impression that generated videos bring to users. It includes multiple aspects such as structural accuracy, motion plausibility, motion stability, and motion vividness. Structural accuracy focuses on detecting structural anomalies in generated content, such as extra limbs, truncation, unnatural bending, or inhuman postures. Motion plausibility involves physical plausibility in trajectory and speed, adherence to physical laws and common sense, and the identification of unnaturally static subjects or those with insufficient movement amplitude. Separately, motion stability is evaluated to detect artifacts caused by subject or background dynamics, while motion vividness addresses the coherence and realism of action sequences, including macro-structural integrity and the aesthetic quality of camera motion.
items.zh: 运动质量 运动质量是生成视频给用户带来的第一直观印象。它包括结构准确性、运动合理性、运动稳定性和运动生动性等多个方面。结构准确性侧重于检测生成内容中的结构异常，如多余肢体、截断、不自然弯曲或非人类姿势。运动合理性涉及轨迹和速度的物理合理性、对物理规律和常识的遵循，以及识别不自然静止或运动幅度不足的主体。此外，评估运动稳定性以检测由主体或背景动态引起的伪影，而运动生动性则处理动作序列的连贯性和真实感，包括宏观结构完整性和相机运动的美学质量。

items.en: Prompt Following Prompt Following represents a foundational capability of generative models, reflecting their ability to produce content aligned with human intent. This evaluation focuses on multiple dimensions, including action responsiveness, subject description fidelity, stylistic conformity, incorporation of auxiliary entities, temporal alignment of motion, camera behavior, and environmental depiction accuracy.
items.zh: 提示遵循 提示遵循是生成模型的基础能力，反映了其生成与人类意图一致内容的能力。该评估关注多个维度，包括动作响应性、主体描述保真度、风格一致性、辅助实体融入、运动的时间对齐、相机行为和环境描绘准确性。

items.en: Aesthetic Quality Evaluation of aesthetic appeal and visual quality in generated video emphasizes visual texture, perceptibility of AI sense, material detail fidelity, and the artistic expression of aesthetic intent.
items.zh: 美学质量 生成视频的美学吸引力和视觉质量评估强调视觉纹理、AI感可感知性、材质细节保真度以及美学意图的艺术表达。

items.en: Preservation Original image preservation, specific to image-to-video tasks, is assessed across multiple dimensions, including subject consistency, stylistic coherence, material fidelity, visual content alignment, and consistency in color and lighting.
items.zh: 原始图像保留 原始图像保留特定于图像到视频任务，从多个维度进行评估，包括主体一致性、风格连贯性、材质保真度、视觉内容对齐以及色彩和光照的一致性。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Absolute Evaluation for Image-to-Video task.
items.capZh: 图12：图像到视频任务的绝对评估。

items.capEn: Figure 13: GSB Evaluation for Image-to-Video task.
items.capZh: 图13：图像到视频任务的GSB评估。

items.en: Leveraging SeedVideoBench 1.0, we conducted a comprehensive comparative evaluation of Seedance 1.0 against several leading video generation models across two tasks: text-to-video and image-to-video generation. For the text-to-video task, comparative models include Kling 2.1(Master), Veo 3, Wan 2.1, and Sora; for the image-to-video task, Sora is replaced by Runway Gen4. Two evaluation protocols are adopted: Absolute Score and the Good-Same-Bad (GSB) comparison metric. The Absolute Score employs a five-point Likert scale (where 1 indicates extreme dissatisfaction and 5 signifies utmost satisfaction), facilitating unified performance comparison across models. The GSB metric conducts pairwise comparisons to assess relative video quality, enabling fine-grained differentiation between model outputs.
items.zh: 利用SeedVideoBench 1.0，我们对Seedance 1.0与多个领先视频生成模型在文本到视频和图像到视频两个任务上进行了全面比较评估。对于文本到视频任务，比较模型包括Kling 2.1（大师版）、Veo 3、Wan 2.1和Sora；对于图像到视频任务，Sora被替换为Runway Gen4。采用两种评估协议：绝对评分和好-相同-差（GSB）比较指标。绝对评分采用五点李克特量表（1表示极度不满意，5表示非常满意），便于跨模型进行统一性能比较。GSB指标进行成对比较以评估相对视频质量，实现模型输出之间的细粒度区分。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Comparison of Multi-Shot Generation. Top: Seedance 1.0; Middle: Kling 2.1; Bottom: Veo 3.
items.capZh: 图14：多镜头生成比较。上：Seedance 1.0；中：Kling 2.1；下：Veo 3。

items.en: Seedance 1.0 demonstrates the capability to generate multiple consecutive shots from a single prompt, while ensuring subject continuity and stylistic coherence across frames. This enables the model to handle complex narrative techniques commonly used in cinematic storytelling. Specifically, Seedance 1.0 facilitates the construction of shot-reverse shot sequences for dialogic interaction, as well as the use of cut-in and cut-away shots to enrich narrative pacing and contextual layering. Furthermore, it supports match cuts and action cuts, enabling seamless transitions and preserving visual continuity. These competencies highlight Seedance’s proficiency in cinematic shot composition and temporal coherence, offering enhanced creative control and narrative expressiveness for video content generation. Figure 14 presents an example of continuous shot transitions generated by Seedance 1.0, which exhibits more coherent and fluid cinematic storytelling compared to other models.
items.zh: Seedance 1.0展示了从单个提示生成多个连续镜头的能力，同时确保帧间主体连续性和风格一致性。这使得模型能够处理电影叙事中常用的复杂叙事技巧。具体来说，Seedance 1.0有助于构建对话交互的正反打镜头序列，以及使用切入和切出镜头来丰富叙事节奏和上下文层次。此外，它还支持匹配剪辑和动作剪辑，实现无缝过渡并保持视觉连续性。这些能力凸显了Seedance在电影镜头构图和时间连贯性方面的熟练程度，为视频内容生成提供了增强的创意控制和叙事表现力。图14展示了Seedance 1.0生成的连续镜头转换示例，与其他模型相比，其电影叙事更加连贯流畅。

items.en: Seedance 1.0 exhibits strong generalization across a broad spectrum of visual styles. In text-to-video (T2V) tasks, Seedance 1.0 enables direct generation of fine-grained stylistic videos, while in image-to-video (I2V) tasks, it reliably preserves visual characteristics of the reference image. The model supports a wide range of real-world cinematic styles, including black-and-white silent films, classic Hong Kong cinema, and retro Hollywood aesthetics, as well as animated and fantasy-oriented styles such as Japanese anime, cyberpunk futurism, and ink-wash animation. This multi-style adaptability facilitates seamless transitions between realism and fantasy without the need for extensive task-specific tuning. As a result, Seedance 1.0 offers exceptional versatility and controllability, making it well-suited for professional filmmaking and AIGC creation.
items.zh: Seedance 1.0在广泛的视觉风格上表现出强大的泛化能力。在文本到视频（T2V）任务中，Seedance 1.0能够直接生成细粒度风格视频，而在图像到视频（I2V）任务中，它可靠地保留了参考图像的视觉特征。该模型支持多种现实电影风格，包括黑白无声电影、经典香港电影和复古好莱坞美学，以及动画和幻想风格，如日本动漫、赛博朋克未来主义和水墨动画。这种多风格适应性使得在现实与幻想之间无缝切换成为可能，无需大量任务特定调整。因此，Seedance 1.0提供了卓越的多功能性和可控性，非常适合专业电影制作和AIGC创作。

items.en: We present several visual outcomes by Seedance 1.0 in Figure 14,15,16. For additional examples, please refer to the official website for an enhanced viewing experience.
items.zh: 我们在图14、15、16中展示了Seedance 1.0的几个视觉结果。更多示例，请访问官方网站以获得更好的观看体验。

items.en: We have introduced Seedance 1.0, a native bilingual video generation foundation model that unifies multiple generation paradigms (such as text-to-video and image-to-video) and excels in instruction following, motion stability, and visual quality. We presented our technical improvements in dataset construction, efficient architecture design with training paradigm, post-training optimization, and inference acceleration, which are integrated effectively to achieve a high-performance model with fast inference. It demonstrates excellent capabilities in handling complex scenarios, multi-shot generation, and long-range temporal coherence, all while delivering fast and photorealistic generation experiences.
items.zh: 我们介绍了Seedance 1.0，一个原生双语视频生成基础模型，它统一了多种生成范式（如文本到视频和图像到视频），并在指令遵循、运动稳定性和视觉质量方面表现出色。我们展示了在数据集构建、高效架构设计与训练范式、后训练优化和推理加速方面的技术改进，这些改进有效集成，实现了高性能模型和快速推理。它在处理复杂场景、多镜头生成和长程时间连贯性方面展现出卓越能力，同时提供快速且逼真的生成体验。
